Matched
0 OR 14
1 OR 25
2 OR 36
3 OR 47
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7
7 I 0

Applying to 10110101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 OR 14 = OR(I 1,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0
1 OR 25 = OR(I 2,I 5) = OR(1,1) = 1
2 OR 36 = OR(I 3,I 6) = OR(1,0) = 1
3 OR 47 = OR(I 4,I 7) = OR(0,1) = 1
4 I 5 = 1
5 I 6 = 0
6 I 7 = 1
7 I 0 = 1

\boxed{01111011}
